Document:
# Do not powergame
Powergaming is to use mechanics in order to gain an unfair or abnormal advantage in the given circumstance of roleplay and character, at the detriment of other players. Typically, situations that involve powergaming remove interesting RP situations or even give people such unfair advantages that completing a certain objective may be impossible.
## Examples
- A passenger gathers dangerous materials, heavy contraband and weapons as a non-antagonist, preparing for a confrontation or a possible antag roll later in the shift. - Giving all access to a security team on green alert "just in case" - Carrying items around that would otherwise be unfitting for someone to have for a reason that has yet to happen - Searching for a weapon as a Scientist to "arm science"
## What isn't powergaming - Grabbing an emergency crowbar for use with firelocks. - Acting in a way responding to the situation around you. - Having extra equipment on hand, like a wrench or other tools. - As an antagonist, taking equipment for use in the future even if there is no direct reason yet.
